title: Fix crosslink quick command to claim lock on new issue

comments.author: m1--f4
comments.content: GH #60: crosslink quick creates issue and sets active work item but does NOT claim a lock. Need to add auto-claim lock logic (from session.rs lines 152-165) into create.rs in both run() and run_subissue() functions, after enforce_lock and before set_session_issue.

comments.author: maxine-at-forecast--noether
comments.content: Completed: PR #83 merged — quick command now claims lock
